title: Muki's Extra Banners
body:
Adds in 27 extra banner patterns.

These patterns are meant to add to vanilla's roster of patterns by making the combined functionality all around better without adding in prefab decorations.

To add resource pack to servers:

1. Open up the server.properties file.

2. Locate resource-pack=

3. Copy and paste this link to a direct download of the resource pack: https://github.com/MukiTanuki/mukis_extra_banners_rp/archive/refs/heads/main.zip
